nl_query: How many boards have a board-level policy overriding the course-level policy?
failed_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT bp.id) AS board_with_overriding_policy
FROM   board_policy bp
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = bp.course_id
WHERE  bp.board_id IS NOT NULL
  AND  bp.course_id IS NULL
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated table(s): board_policy. These tables do not exist in the schema.
